title: rosa × dumetorum subvar. reussii
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subvar. reussii, also known as the hybrid Rosa dumetorum, is a subspecies of the Rosa dumetorum plant, which belongs to the family Rosaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum subvar. reussii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
